bird.summary: The Nicobar megapode or Nicobar scrubfowl (Megapodius nicobariensis) is a megapode found in some of the Nicobar Islands (India). Like other…

locations.name: 尼科巴群岛
locations.summary: 尼科巴群岛（Nicobar Islands，印地語：निकोबार द्वीपसमूह），印度洋中一群岛，位于孟加拉湾和安达曼海之间，北为安达曼群岛，南为印度尼西亚苏门答腊岛，目前与安达曼群岛同属印度安达曼-尼科巴群岛联邦直辖区管辖。群岛…

relations.subject: Nicobar megapode
relations.evidence: Being restricted to small islands and threatened by hunting, the species is vulnerable to extinction
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
